SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-03-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-24-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PARTIAL SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1020.00. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENT AND PICK-UP OF LAUNDRY MACHINE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,670.31 FILED BY BOWLES, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS   C/O RANDY FRY, PRESIDENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTE:TRIED TO CALL PLTFF AGAIN,TO NO AVAIL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWLES, RICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS   C/O RANDY FRY, PRESIDENT $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $482.00, DEFENDANT PICKED UP THE LAUNDRY MACHINE AND ALSO CREDITED PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1052.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
